name: O'l Uncle Deadly
description:
(Artist is Senna Church)

Honestly I like the idea of this guy, I only found out about him like a few days ago. I haven't seen much of the muppets so once again I put my own spin on the character and yeah he is evil but not evil at the same time?

(Also I have a lot of bots so I might just make a few public. Also hope you guys have a good Christmas.)
creator: Kujitoro
